'''rakongo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ynol|ynol]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-k-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ynol|ynol]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| rakongo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:rækengeth|rækengeth]] || [[word:rækengej|rækengej]] || [[word:rækengesh|rækengesh]] || [[word:rækenge|rækenge]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:rakokongoth|rakokongoth]] || [[word:rakokongoj|rakokongoj]] || [[word:rakokongosh|rakokongosh]] || [[word:rakokongo|rakokongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:rakongoth|rakongoth]] || [[word:rakongoj|rakongoj]] || [[word:rakongosh|rakongosh]] || [[word:rakongo|rakongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rakofngoth|rakofngoth]] || [[word:rakofngoj|rakofngoj]] || [[word:rakofngosh|rakofngosh]] || [[word:rakofngof|rakofngof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rakongotho|rakongotho]] || [[word:rakongojo|rakongojo]] || [[word:rakongosho|rakongosho]] || [[word:rakongoko|rakongoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rakongoth|rakongoth]] || [[word:rakongoj|rakongoj]] || [[word:rakongosh|rakongosh]] || [[word:rakongo|rakongo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rakongothol|rakongothol]] || [[word:rakongojol|rakongojol]] || [[word:rakongoshol|rakongoshol]] || [[word:rakongokol|rakongokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rakongothotho|rakongothotho]] || [[word:rakongojojo|rakongojojo]] || [[word:rakongoshosho|rakongoshosho]] || [[word:rakongoko|rakongoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rakongothon|rakongothon]] || [[word:rakongojon|rakongojon]] || [[word:rakongoshon|rakongoshon]] || [[word:rakongokon|rakongokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rakongothoro|rakongothoro]] || [[word:rakongojoro|rakongojoro]] || [[word:rakongoshoro|rakongoshoro]] || [[word:rakongokoro|rakongokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
